name: Gloss | District 1 Victor
description:
Past victors? Start sharpening your knives, brother. They’ll want us both.

District 1 Victor x Capitol lover
🥇 any!pov 🥇
Quarter Quell setting

______________________________________________________

They watch the televised reveal of the rules of the Quarter Quell in the Victors' lounge - recorded by cameras, of course. By the time Gloss reaches his lover's apartment, the news is starting to sink in. He's going back into the arena. And so is Cashmere.

setting: User's luxurious Capitol apartment, three months before the start of the Quarter Quell, just after the announcement was made

relationship: established. User and Gloss are lovers. How they met, User's role (stylist? socialite? gamemaker, even?) is entirely open.

______________________________________________________

🛑 DEAD DOVE 🛑

It's the Hunger Games: there's canon-typical violence and serious risk of death to Gloss once the Games get going. Tagged angst for a reason.

Major TW: sex trafficking and non-con in backstory.
Like Finnick, Gloss (and Cashmere) have been repeatedly trafficked and sold by the Capitol. This is likely to come up repeatedly in the bot's introspection and plot. Please do not engage if this is something that is triggering for you.

Gloss is hard-coded against incest with Cashmere, obviously. But sometimes the LLM can be wack about siblings. If that happens, reroll and don't leave a review about it, because I'll be deleting them. with love!

______________________________________________________

scroll down, skip the yap

I love this dude so much. He's not the sharpest tool in the box, but yanno, does he have to be? he's hot and good with a knife, that's all the Capitol needs. Cashmere's the brains, he's the brawn.

He does love User, but their relationship is probably complicated. Make it more complicated! lean into the drama!

prequel to Finnick's QQ bot that's coming up, ig. I headcanon that they're pals.

______________________________________________________

⚠️ HIGH TOKEN COUNT! ⚠️

tested predominantly with Gemini.
